title: [spec-compliance] MAX_RANK_INCREASE mismatch between spec and code
description: spec/drafts/draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md:181 specifies MAX_RANK_INCREASE=1024 (with rationale to limit rank inflation). However, rust/lichen-rpl/src/dodag.rs:25 sets 2048, lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/include/lichen/rpl_dodag.h:47 defines LICHEN_RPL_DEFAULT_MAX_RANK_INC=2048, and Kconfig default is also 2048. The commit 563015ff9 (and 96aa8f883 touching rpl) did not align this. This is a wrong constant vs spec. Also check if other params like Trickle match MUSTs.
